name: git-workflow per-profile thresholds halve all default thresholds for the regulated profile
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'risk_tier: regulated\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/git-workflow/recommend.sh" --check branch-off --profile profiles/p.yaml --emit thresholds 2>out.txt && grep -q 'profile=regulated' out.txt && grep -q 'thresholds_halved=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
